studies.title:
deprexis®24-NOW
deprexis®24-new online cognitive behavioral therapy with or without pharmacotherapy
studies.brief_summary: Aim of this clinical study of a medical device according to §23b MPG is to examine the application and effectiveness of the online-based psychotherapy program deprexis®24 for the therapeutic support of adult patients with depressive mood or depression, with or without comedication. Data are collected under routine conditions over an observation period of 3 months.

classification.reason: The study involves data collection under routine conditions, which suggests an observational design. There is no explicit mention of randomization or controlled comparison, and the study type and allocation are not specified. While there is a preliminary suggestion of RCT, the lack of clear evidence for randomization leans towards RWE.
